description: Returns a list of all account entity items on the network.

parameters.name: account.balance
parameters.description: The optional balance value to compare against

parameters.name: account.id
parameters.description: The ID of the account to return information for

parameters.name: account.publickey
parameters.description: The account's public key to compare against

parameters.name: balance
parameters.description: Whether to include balance information or not. If included, token balances are limited to at most 50 per account as outlined in HIP-367. If multiple values are provided the last value will be the only value used.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order in which items are listed
